evidence_quotes.quote: cannot simply make the product you purchased unusable after a period of time they see fit.
Right now their EULA's are abusive.

paragraphs.text: Please include a section that specifies for videogames or any other digital media , that companies cannot simply make the product you purchased unusable after a period of time they see fit. Right now their EULA's are abusive. Digital purchases should be treated as fairly as physical purchases. This would create a much better environment for both developers and consumers; with their current practices, companies are alienating their market, since people are more skeptical in purchasing since what they buy can simply be taken away at the whim of big corporations. Thank you for your consideration
